---
title: "Reevaluating Anomalous Electric Fields at the Air–Water Interface"
author: ["Ellen Shirley", "Wei Hsin Ng", "Tsung-Han Chiang", "Yuki Nagata", "Yair Litman", "Arij Singh Hazrah", "Mischa Bonn"]
date: 2025-11-18
publication: "J. Am. Chem. Soc. **147**, 46163–46173 (2025)"
categories: ["aqueous_interfaces"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.5c14541
url_preprint:
journ: "J. Am.  Chem.  Soc."
issue: 147
page: "46163-46173"
year: 2025
pub_number: 30
image: featured.gif
---
